name: Auto-post Google News to Instagram with OpenAI, PDF API Hub & Google Sheets
description:
Automatically fetch trending news from Google News RSS, rewrite headlines into viral captions with OpenAI, generate branded breaking-news images using PDF API Hub's HTML-to-Image API, and publish directly to Instagram — all tracked in a Google Sheet.

**How it works:**
1. A schedule trigger runs every hour and fetches Google News RSS for a configurable topic
2. Articles are deduplicated against existing rows in a Google Sheet
3. New headlines are rewritten by OpenAI into short, punchy, viral-style captions
4. A branded mobile-format image is generated from an HTML template via PDF API Hub
5. The image is posted to Instagram and the sheet row is marked as posted

**Setup steps:**
1. Create a Google Sheet with a tab named `rss` and these columns: guid, title, pubDate, source, link, topic, media_url, is_posted, created_at, updated_at
2. Connect your Google Sheets, OpenAI, PDF API Hub, and Instagram credentials
3. Change the topic in the Set Topic node to your desired search term
4. Customize the HTML template in the Generate News Image node to match your brand
5. Activate the workflow

parameters.content:
## 📰 Google News RSS → Clickbait → Image → Instagram

**What this workflow does:**
1. Fetches trending news from Google News RSS (configurable topic)
2. Deduplicates against a Google Sheet so the same story isn't posted twice
3. Rewrites the headline into a short, viral-style caption using OpenAI
4. Generates a branded breaking-news image via PDF API Hub (HTML → Image)
5. Publishes to Instagram and marks the row as posted

**Before you start — set up your Google Sheet:**
Create a Google Sheet with a tab named `rss` and these column headers in row 1:

| guid | title | pubDate | source | link | topic | media_url | is_posted | created_at | updated_at |

Leave the rows empty — the workflow will populate them automatically.

**Credentials needed:**
- Google Sheets OAuth2
- OpenAI API key
- PDF API Hub API key (get one at pdfapihub.com)
- Instagram API credentials

## ⏰ Trigger & Config

The workflow runs **every hour** via a schedule trigger.

**Config node:** Change the `topic` value to any search term you want (e.g. `ai`, `cricket`, `bitcoin`, `tech`).

This topic is used to build the Google News RSS URL.

## 📋 Fetch & Deduplicate

1. **Fetch Sheet Rows** — Reads all existing rows from your Google Sheet to check what's already been posted.
2. **RSS Feed** — Pulls the latest articles from Google News for your topic.
3. **Dedupe** — Compares RSS items against existing `pubDate` values in the sheet. Only the latest non-duplicate article passes through.

⚠️ Make sure your sheet has the `pubDate` column populated for deduplication to work.

## 💾 Save & Rewrite

1. **Insert Row** — Saves the new article to the sheet immediately (with `is_posted = false`) so it won't be picked up again.
2. **AI Rewrite** — Uses OpenAI (GPT-4o-mini) to rewrite the title into a short, punchy, viral-style message (max 50 tokens, no emoji).

💡 You can swap the OpenAI model or tweak the prompt in the LLM Chain node.

## 🖼️ Generate Image

Converts the rewritten headline into a **branded breaking-news image** (375×812 mobile format) using PDF API Hub's HTML-to-Image API.

The HTML template includes:
- BREAKING badge + LIVE indicator
- Gradient dark background
- The rewritten headline as the main text

✏️ Customize the HTML/CSS in the node to match your brand colors, logo, and style.

## 📲 Publish & Track

1. **Publish to Instagram** — Posts the generated image with a caption.
2. **Update media_url** — Saves the image URL back to the sheet.
3. **Mark as posted** — Sets `is_posted = TRUE` so the article is tracked.

⚠️ The Instagram node requires a connected Facebook/Instagram Business account.

## 📊 Google Sheet Structure

Your Google Sheet **must** have a tab named `rss` with these exact column headers in **Row 1**:

| Column | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `guid` | Unique ID generated per row |
| `title` | Original article title |
| `pubDate` | Publication date (used for dedup) |
| `source` | News source |
| `link` | Original article URL |
| `topic` | Search topic |
| `media_url` | Generated image URL |
| `is_posted` | TRUE/FALSE tracking flag |
| `created_at` | Timestamp |
| `updated_at` | Timestamp |

🔗 Copy this template sheet: Create a new Google Sheet → rename the first tab to `rss` → add the headers above.

parameters.text:
=You are a viral news writer.
INPUT: {{$json["title"]}}

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Rewrite into a short, exciting, high-impact message
- Max 50 tokens total
- 1–2 lines only
- Add urgency or emotion
- No emoji
- Keep it believable (no fake hype)

OUTPUT (STRICT): Just the message text, nothing else.
